# EarnForge

> Developer toolkit for the LI.FI Earn API. Handles 18 integration pitfalls
> so you can focus on building yield products.

## Earn Data API (earn.li.fi)

Base URL: https://earn.li.fi
Auth: NONE. Do not send Authorization or x-lifi-api-key headers.

### GET /v1/earn/vaults

List vaults with optional filters. Returns paginated results (max 50 per page).

Query params:
- chainId (number) -- numeric chain ID, not chain name. e.g. 8453 for Base.
- asset (string) -- token symbol filter, e.g. "USDC"
- minTvl (number) -- minimum TVL in USD
- sortBy (string) -- sort field
- cursor (string) -- pagination cursor from previous response's nextCursor

Response shape:
```json
{
  "data": [ ...vaults ],
  "nextCursor": "abc123" | null,
  "total": 623
}
```

### GET /v1/earn/vaults/{chainId}/{address}

Get a single vault. chainId MUST be a number (e.g. 8453), not a chain name
(e.g. "Base"). Using a chain name returns 400.

### GET /v1/earn/chains

List all supported chains. Returns an array of objects with chainId (number),
name (string), networkCaip (string). Currently 16 chains.

### GET /v1/earn/protocols

List all supported protocols. Returns an array with name and url.

### GET /v1/earn/portfolio/{walletAddress}/positions

Get earn positions for a wallet address. Returns:
```json
{
  "positions": [
    {
      "chainId": 8453,
      "protocolName": "aave-v3",
      "asset": { "address": "0x...", "name": "...", "symbol": "...", "decimals": 6 },
      "balanceUsd": "1234.56",
      "balanceNative": "1234560000"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Composer API (li.quest)

Base URL: https://li.quest
Auth: REQUIRED. Send x-lifi-api-key header. Get a key from https://li.fi.

### GET /v1/quote

Get a deposit/swap/bridge quote. This is GET, not POST. POST returns 405.

Query params:
- fromChain (number) -- source chain ID
- toChain (number) -- destination chain ID (must match vault.chainId)
- fromToken (string) -- source token address
- toToken (string) -- MUST be vault.address (the vault share token), NOT the underlying token address
- fromAddress (string) -- wallet address
- toAddress (string) -- wallet address (same as fromAddress for deposits)
- fromAmount (string) -- amount in smallest unit (wei). Use toSmallestUnit() to convert.
- slippage (number) -- optional, e.g. 0.03 for 3%
- fromAmountForGas (string) -- optional, amount to reserve for gas

Response includes transactionRequest (ready to sign), estimate (gas/fee
costs, execution duration), and action details.

## Vault object -- key field semantics

- address: the vault's share token address. This is what you pass as toToken to Composer.
- chainId: numeric chain ID (number, not string, not chain name)
- slug: "{chainId}-{address}" -- used as a unique identifier
- isTransactional: boolean. If false, deposits via Composer will fail. Check before quoting.
- isRedeemable: boolean. If false, withdrawals may not be supported.
- underlyingTokens: array of { symbol, address, decimals }. Can be empty on some vaults.
- analytics.apy.total: number, always present. The annualized yield.
- analytics.apy.reward: number OR null. Normalized to 0 by EarnForge SDK.
- analytics.apy1d / apy7d / apy30d: number OR null. Use getBestApy() for safe fallback.
- analytics.tvl.usd: STRING, not number. Use parseTvl() to convert.
- description: OPTIONAL. ~14% of vaults omit this field.
- tags: array of strings (e.g. "stablecoin", "lst")
- depositPacks / redeemPacks: available deposit/redeem methods

## 18 Integration Pitfalls

1. Wrong base URL -- Earn Data is earn.li.fi, Composer is li.quest
2. Auth on Earn Data -- do not send auth headers to earn.li.fi
3. Missing Composer key -- li.quest requires x-lifi-api-key
4. POST instead of GET -- /v1/quote is GET with query params
5. Wrong toToken -- must be vault.address, not underlying token
6. Ignoring pagination -- max 50 per page, follow nextCursor
7. Null APY values -- apy1d/apy7d/apy30d can be null
8. TVL is a string -- analytics.tvl.usd is "12345.67" not 12345.67
9. Decimal mismatch -- USDC=6, WETH=18, must convert human amounts
10. Stale quote -- quotes expire quickly, do not cache
11. No gas token -- 0 native balance causes opaque revert
12. Chain mismatch -- wallet chain must match vault chain
13. Non-transactional vault -- ~30% of vaults have isTransactional:false
14. Rate limit -- undocumented limits, use token bucket
15. Empty underlyingTokens -- some vaults return []
16. Optional description -- ~14% omit description field
17. apy.reward null vs 0 -- protocols disagree, normalize to 0
18. apy1d null -- fresh vaults lack historical data, use fallback chain

## EarnForge SDK

Install: npm i @earnforge/sdk

```typescript
import { createEarnForge, riskScore, parseTvl, getBestApy } from "@earnforge/sdk";

const forge = createEarnForge({ composerApiKey: "your-key" });

// List all vaults with auto-pagination
for await (const vault of forge.vaults.listAll({ chainId: 8453 })) {
  console.log(vault.name, vault.analytics.apy.total);
}

// Risk score
const risk = forge.riskScore(vault); // { score: 7.2, label: "low", breakdown: {...} }

// Parse TVL safely
const tvl = parseTvl(vault.analytics.tvl); // { raw: "12345.67", parsed: 12345.67, bigint: 12345n }

// Best APY with fallback
const apy = getBestApy(vault.analytics); // handles null apy1d/apy7d/apy30d

// Build deposit quote (handles pitfalls 3,4,5,9,13,15)
const quote = await forge.buildDepositQuote(vault, {
  fromAmount: "100",
  wallet: "0x...",
});

// Preflight checks (handles pitfalls 11,12,13,15)
const report = forge.preflight(vault, "0x...", {
  walletChainId: 8453,
  nativeBalance: 1000000000000000n,
});

// Portfolio suggestions
const suggestion = await forge.suggest({
  amount: 10000,
  asset: "USDC",
  strategy: "conservative",
});
```

## EarnForge CLI

Install: npm i -g @earnforge/cli

All commands support --json for machine-readable output.

```
earnforge list --chain 8453 --asset USDC --min-apy 0.05 --json
earnforge top --asset USDC --limit 5 --json
earnforge vault 8453-0xbeef... --json
earnforge portfolio 0xwallet... --json
earnforge quote --vault 8453-0xbeef... --amount 100 --wallet 0x... --json
earnforge risk 8453-0xbeef... --json
earnforge suggest --amount 10000 --asset USDC --strategy conservative --json
earnforge watch --vault 8453-0xbeef... --json
earnforge chains --json
earnforge protocols --json
earnforge doctor --vault 8453-0xbeef... --json
earnforge doctor --env --json
```

## Optional: API key

Set the LIFI_API_KEY environment variable for Composer API access
(required for deposit quoting and gas optimization). Earn Data API
endpoints (vaults, chains, protocols, portfolio) work without any key.
